title: Jennifer Hale
content:
{{Actor
|image = Jennifer Hale.jpg
|DOB = January 1, 1965
|game = ''[[LEGO Marvel's Avengers]]''
|character = [[Sharon Carter/Manhattan Avengers Compound|Sharon Carter/Agent 13]]}}
'''Jennifer Leigh Hale''' voiced [[Sharon Carter/Manhattan Avengers Compound|Sharon Carter/Agent 13]] in ''[[LEGO Marvel's Avengers]]''.

==Trivia== 
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Black Cat (Marvel Comics)|Felicia Hardy/Black Cat}} in ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: The Animated Series}}'' and ''{{WPS|Spider-Man (2000 video game)|Spider-Man}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Ghost]] and {{WPS|Julia Carpenter|Julia Carpenter/Spider-Woman}} in ''{{WPS|Iron Man (TV series)|Iron Man}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Mary Jane Watson}} in ''{{WPS|Spider-Man Unlimited}}'' and ''{{WPS|Spider-Man (2000 video game)|Spider-Man}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Jean Grey|Jean Grey/Phoenix]] in ''{{WPS|Wolverine and the X-Men (TV series)|Wolverine and the X-Men}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel Anime: X-Men}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel vs. Capcom 3: Fate of Two Worlds}}'', ''{{WPS|Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order}}'', ''{{WPS|X-Men '97}}'', and ''{{WPS|Marvel Cosmic Invasion}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Tabitha Smith|Tabitha Smith/Boom-Boom}} in ''{{WPS|Wolverine and the X-Men (TV series)|Wolverine and the X-Men}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Captain Marvel|Carol Danvers/Ms. Marvel]] and Corrina Korvac in ''{{WPS|The Avengers: Earth's Mightiest Heroes}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[F.R.I.D.A.Y.]], [[Mel Gold|Melissa Gold/Songbird]] and [[Frigga|Freya]] in ''{{WPS|Avengers Assemble (TV series)|Avengers Assemble}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Mantis]] in ''{{WPS|Guardians of the Galaxy (TV series)|Guardians of the Galaxy}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Rogue (Marvel Comics)|Rogue}} in ''{{WPS|Spider-Man 2: Enter Electro}}'', ''{{WPS|X-Men: Next Dimension}}'', ''{{WPS|X2: Wolverine's Revenge}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] in ''{{WPS|X-Men Legends II: Rise of Apocalypse}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Silver Sable}} in ''{{WPS|Ultimate Spider-Man (video game)|Ultimate Spider-Man}}'', ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Battle for New York}}'', ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Friend or Foe}}'', and ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Shattered Dimensions}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Maria Hill]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel's Avengers (video game)|Marvel's Avengers}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Lilith]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel's Midnight Suns}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced {{WPS|Madeline Pryor|Madeline Pryor/Goblin Queen}} in ''{{WPS|X-Men '97}}''.
*Jennifer Hale voiced [[Hela]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel Cosmic Invasion}}''.
*Jennifer Hale is one of the actors to portray characters for both [[Marvel Studios]] and {{WPS|DC Entertainment}}. She voiced numerous characters across various media, such as {{WPS|Zatanna}}, {{WPS|Killer Frost|Caitlin Snow/Killer Frost}}, and more.
